title: Gbawe Heat Wave
lead: Gbawe is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.40. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Gbawe is causing temperatures to soar, with a CDD of 10.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 74%, and wind speed is 10.4 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no cooling relief, and the situation is dire.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
